title: In the Passover ritual, Jews worldwide reenact ancient story of liberation
description: Passover is a major Jewish holiday, celebrated over the course of a week each spring. It commemorates the Exodus of ancient Israelites from slavery in Egypt, as recounted in the Bible. It is celebrated around family dinner tables and at...

title: VML helps invent T-Rex Leather, made from ancient proteins in dinosaur fossils
description: VML innovation lead Bas Korsten follows up “The Mammoth Meatball” with couture based on prehistoric biology.

title: 'Tales of Guan Yu' Documentary Reframes Ancient Icon for Modern Audiences
description: TAIYUAN, China, April 2, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- A new five-part documentary series from China reexamines Lord Guan (Guan Yu), the 3rd century warrior, not as a relic of the past but as a figure whose influence is still shaping how young people across the globe think about loyalty, honor, and identity....

title: Vermont defends its law to make fossil fuel companies pay for climate change against the Trump admin’s challenge
description: Vermont is defending its Climate Superfund Act in court against the Trump administration's legal challenges, arguing that it is within the state's authority to regulate fossil fuel emissions and recover costs to help the state adapt to climate change.
